entry_transition.notes: Vertical push simulates the sudden arrival at cliff edge — landscape 'drops away' as M3's forward momentum meets M4's abrupt obstacle. Motion from M3 resolves into stillness at precipice.

exit_handoff.leaves_on: Player mid-crossing or just landed on far side — body language transitioning from tension (bridge/chasm) to alertness as dense vegetation looms. Wind/motion blur fading, replaced by enclosing shadows of forest threshold.
exit_handoff.next_scene_should_open_with: Immediate environmental shift: claustrophobic vegetation closing in, light quality changing (darker/filtered), checkpoint emotion 'הצמחייה סוגרת עליי' viscerally present. Player reorienting from open chasm to enclosed jungle.

mood_arc: M3's racing urgency crashes into M4's forced pause at the chasm — adrenaline pivots from horizontal chase to vertical problem-solving. Crossing restores momentum but with new vulnerability (exposure, isolation from lead group).
visual_callbacks: Dust/motion blur from M3's path choice carries into M4's opening frame, settling as player stops at cliff edge
Competitor silhouettes (distant, on far side or disappearing into trees) — visual echo of M3's 'נושפת בעורפי' pressure
Directional lean from M3's decisive posture continues in M4 as player faces right toward bridge/far side
rationale: Push_up transition mirrors the physical 'drop' of discovering the chasm, converting M3's forward drive into M4's vertical challenge. Exit preps M5 for environmental claustrophobia (checkpoint: 'הצמחייה סוגרת') by showing vegetation threshold as crossing completes. Callbacks maintain race context (competitors) while grounding the obstacle's immediacy (motion → stillness → motion).
